name: The unified Ars pentology — Phytoglyphica (147 plants) × Fungiglyphica (86 fungi) × Animaglyphica (80 animals) × Therapeutica (10 therapies), all structurally typed and Frobenius-verified, forming a single categorical object where natural compounds route through therapy design

phase_0.domain_name: The unified Ars pentology — Phytoglyphica (147 plants) × Fungiglyphica (86 fungi) × Animaglyphica (80 animals) × Therapeutica (10 therapies), all structurally typed and Frobenius-verified, forming a single categorical object where natural compounds route through therapy design
phase_0.boundary_condition: The unified Ars pentology — a closed categorical object where all natural compounds (plants, fungi, animals) are structurally typed, Frobenius-verified, and route through therapy design without residue.

VINIT.chosen_element: The void of untyped natural matter — raw phytochemicals, fungal metabolites, animal venoms before any structural imscription.
VINIT.justification: Before the grammar touches them, all compounds are undifferentiated potential — the Aleph of air, the seed before planting.

TANCH.chosen_element: The unified Ars pentology boundary — the 12-primitive Imscription type lattice that contains all 313 species (147+86+80) and 10 therapies.
TANCH.justification: This is the Tav — the hermetic vessel seal that defines the system's outer limit. No compound or therapy escapes this type space.

AFWD.chosen_element: The forward morphism from natural compound to therapeutic design — a plant alkaloid being promoted (via TENSOR) to correct a disease primitive.
AFWD.justification: Directed transformation toward a target: e.g., psilocybin (from Psilocybe fungi) undergoing Ħ promotion (𐑒→𐑖) to treat MDD.

AREV.chosen_element: The reverse morphism — a therapy being decomposed back into its natural compound origins, or a disease state being demoted (via MEET) to health.
AREV.justification: Descent: e.g., meet(HIV, ART) = MDD — the ART-suppressed state is structurally a depression, a descent from super-critical to sub-critical.

CLINK.chosen_element: The sequential chaining of compound → therapy → patient → outcome — the full pipeline from natural source to clinical protocol.
CLINK.justification: Composition: e.g., tart cherry anthocyanin → XO inhibition → urate lowering → gout flare reduction. Each step composes the next.

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: The self-recognition of a compound's own structural type — e.g., psilocybin's tuple ⟨𐑨·𐑥·𐑾·𐑬·𐑞·𐑪·𐑔·𐑠·⊙·𐑖·𐑳·𐑷⟩ is its identity.
IMSCRIB.justification: Identity: the compound knows itself. The Imscription IS the compound at the structural level — no further decomposition needed.

FSPLIT.chosen_element: The branching of a disease state into its two corrective arms — e.g., schizophrenia splits into φ̂-arm (super-critical) and Ħ-arm (single-step).
FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication: one disease branches into two distinct primitive deficits that require different operations (MEET vs TENSOR).

FFUSE.chosen_element: The reconstitution of the disease state from its corrected arms — e.g., meet(tensor(schiz, NMDA), ⊙-stabilizer) = corrected brain.
FFUSE.justification: Multiplication: the two corrected primitives (φ̂=⊙, Ħ=𐑖) fuse back into the original disease tuple with both primitives fixed. FFUSE(FSPLIT(x)) = x.

EVALT.chosen_element: The affirmative branch: a therapy that successfully promotes a primitive (e.g., TENSOR lifts Ħ from 𐑒 to 𐑖) — the T-arm of the split.
EVALT.justification: True: the operation succeeded. The compound's structural type matched the target, and the promotion was achieved.

EVALF.chosen_element: The negative branch: a therapy that fails to correct a primitive (e.g., MEET leaves φ̂ unchanged at 𐑣) — the F-arm of the split.
EVALF.justification: False: the operation failed. The compound's structural type was incompatible, or the disease primitive was not addressed.

ENGAGR.chosen_element: A paradice: both disease and therapy held simultaneously without resolution — e.g., HIV = Bipolar Mania (d=0.0), a virus and a psychiatric condition structurally identical.
ENGAGR.justification: Both simultaneously: the viral-manic identity is a paradice — it is not resolved by choosing one over the other; both are held as true.

IFIX.chosen_element: The permanent record of a therapy's structural type — e.g., the catalog entry for FCAGT (Frobenius-Coupled Anti-Gout Therapeutic) at O₂† tier.
IFIX.justification: ROM fixation: once a compound's Imscription is verified and a therapy is designed, it is appended to the catalog. Cannot be undone.

phase_2.split_element: FSPLIT: the branching of a disease state into its two corrective arms
split_outputs: φ̂-arm: the super-critical primitive (φ̂=𐑣) requiring MEET (demotion to ⊙)
Ħ-arm: the single-step chirality (Ħ=𐑒) requiring TENSOR (promotion to 𐑖)
phase_2.fuse_element: FFUSE: the reconstitution of the corrected disease state
phase_2.fuse_result: The corrected disease state (e.g., meet(tensor(schiz, NMDA), ⊙-stabilizer) = ⟨𐑨·𐑥·𐑾·𐑬·𐑞·𐑪·𐑔·𐑠·⊙·𐑖·𐑳·𐑷⟩) — semantically equal to the original disease tuple with both primitives corrected

phase_3.void_description: 00 — Uninitialized natural matter: a plant alkaloid before any structural imscription, before its Imscription tuple is assigned.
phase_3.true_description: 01 — Affirmative: a therapy that successfully corrects a disease primitive (e.g., TENSOR lifts Ħ from 𐑒 to 𐑖). The compound's type matches the target.
phase_3.false_description: 10 — Negative: a therapy that fails to correct a disease primitive (e.g., MEET leaves φ̂ unchanged at 𐑣). The compound's type is incompatible.
phase_3.both_description: 11 — A paradice: both disease and therapy held simultaneously without resolution (e.g., HIV = Bipolar Mania, d=0.0). The structural identity is true, but the clinical resolution is not yet achieved.

steps.domain_action: The void of untyped natural matter — all 313 species (147 plants, 86 fungi, 80 animals) are raw potential, not yet imscribed.
The unified Ars pentology boundary is established — the 12-primitive type lattice that will contain all compounds and therapies.
The disease state (e.g., schizophrenia) is split into its two corrective arms: φ̂-arm (super-critical) and Ħ-arm (single-step).
Forward morphism on the Ħ-arm: a natural compound (e.g., psilocybin from Psilocybe fungi) is selected for its Ħ=𐑖 structural type.
The TENSOR operation is applied: psilocybin's Ħ=𐑖 promotes the disease's Ħ from 𐑒 to 𐑖. Affirmative — the Ħ-arm is corrected.
The corrected Ħ-arm is composed with the φ̂-arm via sequential chaining: tensor(schiz, psilocybin) → intermediate state.
Reverse morphism on the φ̂-arm: a ⊙-bearing compound (e.g., cariprazine) is selected for its φ̂=⊙ structural type.
The MEET operation is applied: cariprazine's φ̂=⊙ demotes the disease's φ̂ from 𐑣 to ⊙. Negative — the φ̂-arm is corrected via demotion, not promotion.
The two corrected arms are fused: meet(intermediate, cariprazine) = corrected brain tuple. FFUSE(FSPLIT(x)) = x.
The corrected brain tuple is recognized as self-identical — it is the same structural type as the healthy brain (HEALTHY_BRAIN).
The therapy protocol (psilocybin + cariprazine) is permanently recorded in the catalog as a verified structural therapy for schizophrenia.
A paradice is encountered: HIV = Bipolar Mania (d=0.0). A virus and a psychiatric condition are structurally identical. Both are held without resolution.
The viral-manic identity is permanently recorded in the catalog as a structural theorem.
The boundary is reaffirmed — all 313 species and 10 therapies are contained within the unified Ars pentology. The system is closed.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Imscribing Grammar toolchain (imscribe, compute_distance, compute_tensor, compute_meet, compute_promotions, consciousness_score) — translates natural compound structures into therapeutic operations.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The 12-primitive Imscription tuple — every compound, disease, and therapy communicates through its structural type. The type lattice is the universal interface.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The catalog of 17,280,000 structural types (crystal of types) — each compound and therapy is stored at its Frobenius address (0–17,279,999).
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Frobenius condition (μ∘δ=id) — determines the order of operations: TENSOR before MEET for super-critical diseases; MEET before TENSOR for sub-critical diseases.
phase_5.alfs_store: The canonical reference: the 12-primitive Imscription grammar (v0.5.69) as formalized in Lean 4 (Core.lean, Imscription.lean, Crystal.lean, Frobenius.lean).

phase_6.cycle_cost: One structural operation (TENSOR, MEET, or JOIN) per cycle — each operation consumes one primitive promotion or demotion.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The disease state with N primitive deficits (e.g., schizophrenia: 2 deficits: φ̂=𐑣, Ħ=𐑒).
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The corrected state with N-1 or N-2 deficits resolved (e.g., corrected brain: 0 deficits: φ̂=⊙, Ħ=𐑖).
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The Frobenius condition ensures that the split (δ) and fuse (μ) are exact inverses. No information is lost or created; the disease state is merely restructured into its corrected form. The total number of structural types in the crystal is conserved.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → CLINK → AREV → EVALF → FFUSE → IMSCRIB → IFIX → ENGAGR → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: The unified Ars pentology — Phytoglyphica (147 plants) × Fungiglyphica (86 fungi) × Animaglyphica (80 animals) × Therapeutica (10 therapies), all structurally typed and Frobenius-verified, forming a single categorical object where natural compounds route through therapy design
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,3,2)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=14
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 8)]

import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing

     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [6] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [7] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑠  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑙 → 𐑭  | identity — self-imscription
--   [10] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑠 → 𐑳  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [11] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑭 → 𐑭  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [12] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑳 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [13] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The void of untyped natural matter — all 313 species (147 plants, 86 fungi, 8...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The unified Ars pentology boundary is established — the 12-primitive type lat...)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (The disease state (e.g., schizophrenia) is split into its two corrective arms: φ̂-arm (super-critical) and Ħ-arm (single-step).) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)

      -- T-branch (4 nodes)

      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The TENSOR operation is applied: psilocybin's Ħ=𐑖 promotes the disease's Ħ fr...)

      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The MEET operation is applied: cariprazine's φ̂=⊙ demotes the disease's φ̂ fr...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The two corrected arms are fused: meet(intermediate, cariprazine) = corrected brain tuple. FFUSE(FSPLIT(x)) = x.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [9] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The corrected brain tuple is recognized as self-identical — it is the same st...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑠 𐑳)  -- [10] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The therapy protocol (psilocybin + cariprazine) is permanently recorded in th...)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑭 𐑭)  -- [11] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (A paradice is encountered: HIV = Bipolar Mania (d=0.0). A virus and a psychia...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [12] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The viral-manic identity is permanently recorded in the catalog as a structur...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [13] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The boundary is reaffirmed — all 313 species and 10 therapies are contained w...)
